title: Wonderful Water Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: The clear liquid we drink, and that fills rivers and rain.
rounds.explanation: water: The clear liquid we drink, and that fills rivers and rain.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Water that falls from clouds and fills puddles and rivers.
rounds.explanation: rain: Water that falls from clouds and fills puddles and rivers.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Describes a bright day with warm sun and few clouds.
rounds.explanation: sunny: Describes a bright day with warm sun and few clouds.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Drops of water that fall down from grey clouds.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Lots of water moving along the land to the sea.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Describes a sky covered with grey or white clouds.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Samira drinks cool water after school.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: My towel is warm and dry.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Rain fills the well in our village.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: What falls from the clouds when it rains?
rounds.explanation: Rain is drops of water from the clouds; sand, leaves and stones do not fall from clouds.

rounds.prompt: What do we use water for before we pray?
rounds.explanation: We wash with clean water before we pray; writing, reading and sleeping do not need water.

rounds.prompt: Which is a good way to save water?
choices: Turn the tap off while you brush your teeth.
Leave the tap running all day.
Play with the garden hose for hours.
Fill the bath right to the top.
rounds.answer: Turn the tap off while you brush your teeth.
rounds.explanation: Turning the tap off stops water being wasted; the other choices all waste a lot of water.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: Who walked to the well with Amal every morning?
choices: Because the well was getting low
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Her big brother, Adam

rounds.prompt: Adam says water is precious. How much must they not waste?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Not one drop

rounds.prompt: Why did the whole village share the water?
choices: Because the well was getting low
rounds.answer: Because the well was getting low
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Because the well was getting low

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 1 - Listen and point
rounds.target: Mime a job you need water for, then say it.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 3 - Ask and answer
rounds.target: and answer about living things that drink.

rounds.prompt: Speaking 5 - Role-play
rounds.target: Role-play washing your hands carefully with a partner.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: I wash my hands before eating.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Today is sunny and very warm.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: A small fish swims in the pond.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'sea' mean in this unit?
choices: A huge amount of salty water with waves and fish.
The clear liquid we drink, and that fills rivers and rain.
One tiny round bit of water, smaller than your fingertip.
rounds.answer: A huge amount of salty water with waves and fish.
rounds.explanation: sea: A huge amount of salty water with waves and fish.

rounds.prompt: What does 'windy' mean in this unit?
choices: The clear liquid we drink, and that fills rivers and rain.
One tiny round bit of water, smaller than your fingertip.
Describes weather when strong air pushes and moves things.
rounds.answer: Describes weather when strong air pushes and moves things.
rounds.explanation: windy: Describes weather when strong air pushes and moves things.

rounds.prompt: What does 'drop' mean in this unit?
choices: Having no water on it at all, like sand in sunshine.
One tiny round bit of water, smaller than your fingertip.
The clear liquid we drink, and that fills rivers and rain.
rounds.answer: One tiny round bit of water, smaller than your fingertip.
rounds.explanation: drop: One tiny round bit of water, smaller than your fingertip.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'grow plants'?
rounds.explanation: grow plants is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'turtle'?
rounds.explanation: turtle is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'float'?
rounds.explanation: float is used as a verb in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: One tiny round bit of water, smaller than your fingertip.
Having no water on it at all, like sand in sunshine.
To go down under the water instead of staying on top.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A huge amount of salty water with waves and fish.
To make something clean again using water and a little soap.
Describes a day when rain keeps falling from the sky.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: Describes weather when strong air pushes and moves things.
A small green animal that hops and swims in ponds.
A long river animal with sharp teeth and short legs.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: A leaf stays on top of the water. What is the leaf doing?
rounds.explanation: Staying on top is called floating; sinking means going to the bottom.

rounds.prompt: Sami drops a heavy stone into a bucket of water. What does it do?
rounds.explanation: A heavy stone sinks to the bottom; only light things like a leaf float on top.

rounds.prompt: Which of these needs water to stay alive?
rounds.explanation: Plants are living and need water; a rock, a spoon and a chair are not alive.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which word is a water word?
rounds.explanation: Rain is water falling from the clouds; a chair, a shoe and a book have nothing to do with water.

rounds.prompt: Samira stood outside in the rain. How are her clothes now?
rounds.explanation: Rain makes clothes wet; dry is the opposite, and hot and loud do not describe rainy clothes.

rounds.prompt: Which word means the opposite of wet?
rounds.explanation: Dry is the opposite of wet; rain, drop and float are all still to do with water.
